browserSource.customScreenHint: Any built-in screen can be pinned this way by adding ?screen= to the URL, useful for feeding a venue TV a different view than OBS. Custom screens can't be pinned; that view follows the operator.
browserSource.hint: Add as a Browser Source in OBS at your canvas resolution; the background is transparent.
browserSource.title: OBS Browser Source

keyboardShortcutRow.invalidKey: That key can't be used in a shortcut.
keyboardShortcutRow.needModifier: Include Cmd/Ctrl or Alt in the shortcut.

keyboardShortcuts.globalHint: Each shortcut also works system-wide (e.g. while OBS is focused) with Alt added, unless the shortcut already includes Alt.
keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts

scoreboardClock.description: Time-of-day format on the spectator scoreboard screen.
scoreboardClock.title: Scoreboard Clock

language.description: Language used for menus and on-air graphics.
